misc: The phenomenon called 'Okkotoberfest' was named after his alcohol-induced condition in a past Hector event
biography: Okko, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a unique blend of tenacity and occasional unpredictability to the greens. Representing Hirsala Golf, Okko has graced this tournament on five occasions, securing one coveted Hector Trophée victory.
Known for his solid play and strategic mind, Okko is a formidable competitor in the pair format. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his consistent performance makes him one to watch.

Off the course, Okko's name is etched in Hector Trophée lore for a different reason. The infamous 'Okkotoberfest' is a testament to a past event where Okko's spirited celebrations reached legendary status. It's also rumored that Okko has historically had back problems.
Although not currently slated to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, his active status in past Hector events suggests that a return to the competition is always a possibility.
